title: Wall Chart F – Management of Hypoglycaemia
learningObjectives: Identify a newborn infant (NYI) with hypoglycaemia
Manage a baby with blood glucose < 45 mg/dL (2.5 mmol/L) when NOT symptomatic
Manage a baby with blood glucose < 45 mg/dL (2.5 mmol/L) when symptomatic

sections.learningObjective: Identify a newborn infant (NYI) with hypoglycaemia

sections.title: Chart B: Management if NOT symptomatic
sections.learningObjective: Manage a baby with blood glucose < 45 mg/dL (2.5 mmol/L) when NOT symptomatic

image.description: Algorithm for treating a non‑symptomatic baby with severe hypoglycaemia

sections.title: Chart C: Management if symptomatic
sections.learningObjective: Manage a baby with blood glucose < 45 mg/dL (2.5 mmol/L) when symptomatic

image.description: Algorithm for treating a symptomatic baby with severe hypoglycaemia
